hero.title: A Reflective Harbor, Unforgettable Honfleur
hero.description: Port of Honfleur is located at the edge of the old town on the Normandy coast.

photos.title: Photo Collage: Capture the Port
photos.desc: We prioritize real photos from Google Maps.
photos.alt_sailboats: Sailboats and buildings at Vieux Bassin
photos.alt_aerial: Aerial view of Honfleur Old Port
photos.alt_locks: Aerial view of harbor locks and channel

reviews.title: Reviews & Experience: Shared Feelings
reviews.desc: We have retrieved the rating and number of reviews from Google Maps.
reviews.rating_desc: Rating and review count from Google Maps.
reviews.count_desc: A high number of reviews means you can see photos.
reviews.cta_desc: We provide direct links to ensure you see the latest.

map.title: Map & Directions
map.desc: Use the Google Maps embed code.
map.tips_desc: The old town of Honfleur is best explored on foot.
map.golden_hour_desc: Evening and blue hour: reflections, lights, and atmosphere are at their peak.
map.photo_spot_desc: Low angles on the building side of the shore make it easier to capture water mirror images.
map.route_plan_desc: Click the button to open Google Maps.

blog.title: Blog Position
blog.placeholder_desc: You can connect blog content to static Markdown.

footer.built_as: Built as a static scenic page.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.overview_desc: This page explains how this website handles information.
privacy.use_desc: Information is only used to improve page display.
privacy.third_party_desc: Google Maps is provided by Google.
privacy.contact_desc: If you have questions about privacy issues, please contact the technical support email.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.use_terms_desc: By accessing this website, you agree to these basic terms of service.
terms.content_desc: The photos on this website come from public sources.
terms.disclaimer_desc: While we strive to provide accurate information, we are not responsible for the absolute accuracy.
terms.links_desc: This website contains links to external sites.
terms.changes_desc: We reserve the right to update these terms at any time.

cookies.title: Cookie Settings
cookies.what_desc: Cookies are small text files stored on your device.
cookies.how_desc: As a static page, we do not set first-party cookies for tracking.
cookies.manage_desc: You can manage or delete cookies through your browser settings.
